summary: Debrief Portal testing complete. All backend APIs (18/18 tests) and frontend UI flows working correctly. The anonymous feedback questionnaire portal for Radio Check beta testing is fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper Pydantic validation for all rating fields (1-5 for most, 0-10 for NPS)
MongoDB _id correctly excluded from API responses using projection
CSV export properly handles personas_used list by joining with commas
PDF export uses WeasyPrint for professional report generation with NPS calculation
Frontend HTML is self-contained with inline CSS and JavaScript - no external dependencies
Form data collection uses data-field attributes for clean data binding
test_credentials: No auth required - anonymous feedback system
seed_data_creation: Test submissions created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Debrief portal is a standalone HTML page served at /api/debrief-portal. Backend APIs at /api/debrief/* handle submissions, summary stats, and CSV/PDF exports. All endpoints are public (no auth). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_debrief.py covers all endpoints.

backend.GET /api/debrief-portal: PASS - Returns standalone HTML feedback page
backend.POST /api/debrief/submit: PASS - Accepts anonymous feedback with validation
backend.Rating validation: PASS - Rejects invalid ratings (422 for out-of-range)
backend.Personas list handling: PASS - Accepts array of persona names

frontend.Progress bar: PASS - Updates as user navigates sections
frontend.Submit button: PASS - Changes to 'Submit Feedback' on last section
frontend.Thank you screen: PASS - Displays checkmark and message on success
